name: progress
title: Progress
description: A progress bar that displays completion status for a task or process.

docs.overview: Progress displays a horizontal bar indicating the completion status of a task. Supports optional label and percentage display.
docs.usage: Progress({ value: 60, max: 100, label: 'Uploading...', showValue: true })
docs.accessibility: Uses the 'progressbar' accessibility role. Provide an accessibilityLabel for screen readers when no visible label is present.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label displayed above the progress bar

props.name: showValue
props.description: Whether to display the current percentage value next to the label

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Custom accessibility label for screen readers. Defaults to label or 'Progress X%'.

examples.name: custom-max
examples.title: Progress with Custom Max
examples.code: Progress({ value: 3, max: 5, label: 'Steps completed', showValue: true })

agent.summary: Progress displays a horizontal bar showing task completion status.
layoutHints: Place Progress below a label and above action buttons
Use full width inside cards or containers
accessibilityChecklist: Always provide a label or accessibilityLabel
Value changes should be announced to screen readers
Use meaningful max values that match the user's mental model
